title: HIDMaestro Controller Profile
description: Defines the identity and HID characteristics of a game controller for virtual device emulation.

vid.description: USB Vendor ID as hex string (e.g. '0x045E')

pid.description: USB Product ID as hex string (e.g. '0x028E')

productString.description: String returned by IOCTL_HID_GET_STRING (iProduct). This is what joy.cpl and games see.

manufacturerString.description: String returned for manufacturer query (iManufacturer). Null if unknown.

descriptor.description: HID report descriptor as a hex string (e.g. '05010905A101...'). Null if not yet captured.

inputReportSize.description: Size of the input report in bytes (excluding report ID). Null if unknown.

deviceDescription.description: Device Manager display name (from vendor INF or Windows HID class). Null means use productString. This is what FriendlyName gets set to on the device node.

notes.description: Implementation notes, caveats, or special behavior.
